content:
✨ thumbmarkjs | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating unique browser fingerprints for security purposes, such as preventing scams and spam, and detecting malicious traffic.
✨ Key Features: • Free, open-source client-side JavaScript fingerprinting library • Generates unique browser fingerprints • Enhanced API version with server-side components
📖 Summary: ThumbmarkJS is a free, open-source JavaScript library for browser fingerprinting, designed to generate unique identifiers for users. It offers both a client-side library for basic fingerprinting and an enhanced API version with server-side components for more robust detection of bots, VPNs, and threats, aiming to prevent scams and spam.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
